title: The Big Sky Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A dark shape made when something blocks the light.
rounds.explanation: shadow: A dark shape made when something blocks the light.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The time when the sun goes down in the evening.
rounds.explanation: sunset: The time when the sun goes down in the evening.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Near the ground or below another level.
rounds.explanation: low: Near the ground or below another level.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: The brightness that lets us see things.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: The bright round object we see in the night sky.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Giving out or sending back a lot of light.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: My shadow follows me when the sun shines.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The sky is blue in the day and dark at night.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: At sunset the sun goes down and the sky turns orange.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Yesterday I ____ at the moon for a long time.
rounds.explanation: Yesterday tells us the action is already finished, so the verb adds -ed. Look and looks are present forms, and looking needs a helping word.

rounds.prompt: The sky is full of grey clouds and we cannot see the sun. What is the weather like?
rounds.explanation: Cloudy means many clouds cover the sky and hide the sun. Orange is a colour, midday is a time, and sunny is the opposite of what the question describes.

rounds.prompt: The compound word sunrise is made from two little words. Which two?
rounds.explanation: Sunrise splits into sun and rise. The other three joins make seaside, raincoat and moonlight.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: The poet writes about his shadow as if it were a person. Which little word does he use instead of “it”?
choices: From the heels up to the head, which is his whole body.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Him.

rounds.prompt: When is the shadow on a sundial short, and when is it long?
choices: From the heels up to the head, which is his whole body.
In the morning the sun was low, so her shadow was long. At midday the sun was high, so her shadow was short.
It is short at midday, and it is long in the morning and long again in the evening.
rounds.answer: It is short at midday, and it is long in the morning and long again in the evening.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: It is short at midday, and it is long in the morning and long again in the evening.

rounds.prompt: Why was Amal's shadow long in the morning but short at midday?
choices: It disappeared for a moment, because the cloud blocked the light.
In the morning the sun was low, so her shadow was long. At midday the sun was high, so her shadow was short.
It jumps before him, so it seems to jump into bed first.
rounds.answer: In the morning the sun was low, so her shadow was long. At midday the sun was high, so her shadow was short.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: In the morning the sun was low, so her shadow was long. At midday the sun was high, so her shadow was short.

games.title: Speaking Quest

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1 — Describe the Sky

rounds.prompt: Speaking 5 — Shadow Scientist
rounds.target: When my part of Earth faces the sun, it is day.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: We can see the moon and stars at night.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The sun is low in the evening.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'star' mean in this unit?
choices: A tiny point of light in the night sky. The sun is a star.
A dark shape made when something blocks the light.
The star that gives Earth light and heat in the day.
rounds.answer: A tiny point of light in the night sky. The sun is a star.
rounds.explanation: star: A tiny point of light in the night sky. The sun is a star.

rounds.prompt: What does 'blue' mean in this unit?
choices: A dark shape made when something blocks the light.
The star that gives Earth light and heat in the day.
Having the colour of a clear daytime sky.
rounds.answer: Having the colour of a clear daytime sky.
rounds.explanation: blue: Having the colour of a clear daytime sky.

rounds.prompt: What does 'sun' mean in this unit?
choices: The space above the Earth that you see when you look up.
The star that gives Earth light and heat in the day.
A dark shape made when something blocks the light.
rounds.answer: The star that gives Earth light and heat in the day.
rounds.explanation: sun: The star that gives Earth light and heat in the day.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'short'?
rounds.explanation: short is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'windy'?
rounds.explanation: windy is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'midday'?
rounds.explanation: midday is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: The star that gives Earth light and heat in the day.
The space above the Earth that you see when you look up.
The part of the day before night, when the sun sets.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: A tiny point of light in the night sky. The sun is a star.
The time when your part of Earth faces away from the sun and it is dark.
Far above the ground or above another level.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: Having very little light, so it is hard to see.
Bright with plenty of sunshine and very few clouds.
With rain falling, or with rain likely to fall.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: The sun is a ____ of light and heat.
rounds.explanation: A source is the place something comes from, so the sun is our biggest source of light. A shadow is dark, midday is a time, and a cloud blocks the light.

rounds.prompt: Which sentence uses a describing word correctly?
rounds.explanation: The describing word blue comes straight after is. The word colour is not needed, and the other two sentences are in the wrong order.

rounds.prompt: Which sentence is written correctly in the present simple?
choices: The sun rise in the east.
The sun rises in the east.
The sun rising in the east.
The sun to rise in the east.
rounds.answer: The sun rises in the east.
rounds.explanation: The sun is an “it”, so its verb takes -s. The other three sentences have the wrong verb form.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: What does the word shadow mean?
choices: The time when the sun goes down in the evening.
White or grey shapes in the sky made of tiny drops of water.
A dark shape made when something blocks the light.
The brightness that lets us see things.
rounds.answer: A dark shape made when something blocks the light.
rounds.explanation: A shadow needs something solid to stop the light. The other three choices describe sunset, clouds and light.

rounds.prompt: Which of these gives Earth its light and heat in the day?
rounds.explanation: The sun is the star closest to us, and it gives Earth both light and heat. Evening is a time, a raincoat is clothing, and grey is a colour.

rounds.prompt: Which of these is the time when your part of Earth faces away from the sun?
rounds.explanation: When your part of Earth has turned away from the sun, it is night. A cloud is a sky object, a source is where something comes from, and windy describes the weather.
